---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement to Mercury CLI
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Why now

Explain why this should be prioritized over repair-core work.

## Alternatives considered

List any simpler or lower-risk alternatives.

## Evidence

Reference any benchmark data, failing workflow, or release gap that justifies the work.

## Scope label

Choose one:

- [ ] v0.2 repair core
- [ ] v0.3 CI auto-repair
- [ ] post-1.0 runtime
- [ ] other
